Container.Name: patchpulse
Container.Overview:
Release notes + CVE context for your Docker container updates.
What it does: - Reads your Docker socket to list every running container - Polls Docker Hub / GHCR / Quay for new image versions (default: every 6h) - Fetches the release notes when a new version appears (GitHub Releases API → CHANGELOG.md → commit log) - Scans your currently-running image for unfixed CVEs via bundled Grype - Shows it all in a web UI — one row per container - Optional: Update now button (docker compose pull && up -d), gated by a service-name confirmation
First-run: - Open the WebUI — the first-run wizard will ask you to create an admin - No YAML config files. Everything lives in the web UI.
Pre-release beta — report issues on GitHub.
Container.DonateText: If you like my work, please consider a donation!
Container.Description: Release notes + CVE context for your Docker container updates. Install and run — no config files.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket. Read-only by default = notify + CVE scan only. Remove :ro and enable the Update action in Settings if you want the 'Update now' button in the UI.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Optional. Seed the admin username non-interactively. Leave blank to create via the first-run web wizard.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional. Seed the admin password non-interactively. Leave blank to create via the first-run web wizard (recommended).
